get.summary: List labels applied to a node

put.summary: Apply a label to a node

delete.summary: Remove a label from a node

put.summary: Create or update a node custom property

parts.description: Completed multipart upload parts ordered by ascending unique partNo.

objectKey.description: Deprecated compatibility field. The service ignores this value and generates an internal sdkwork-drive/v1 object key.

id.description: Optional client-supplied node id for offline or idempotent retries. When omitted, the service assigns a server-generated id.

token.description: Optional client-supplied token. When omitted, the server generates a high-entropy token and returns it once in the create response.

accessCode.description: Optional extraction code required by recipients before resolving or downloading the shared link.

objectKey.description: Deprecated compatibility field. The service ignores this value and generates an internal sdkwork-drive/v1 object key.

shortcutTargetNodeId.description: Target node id when nodeType is shortcut.

scene.description: Drive uploader usage context identifier. Optional semantic context for idempotency, ownership, and cleanup scoping.

source.description: Drive uploader usage context identifier. Optional semantic context for idempotency, ownership, and cleanup scoping.

contentState.description: File content lifecycle on the node. Folders and shortcuts remain empty.

fileExtension.description: Normalized file extension without a leading dot.

contentType.description: MIME type of the latest active file version.

contentTypeGroup.description: Coarse file category derived from contentType for list filtering and icons.

contentLength.description: Byte size of the latest active file version.

folderColor.description: Optional UI folder color from node property ui.folderColor.

token.description: Raw share token returned only once when the share link is created.

accessCode.description: Extraction code returned only once when configured at create time.

storageProviderId.description: Drive storage provider id bound to this upload session.

storageUploadId.description: Provider-side multipart upload id used by the configured object store.

incompletePage.description: True when ACL pagination scan budget was exhausted before the requested page could be filled.

quotaBytes.description: Configured tenant storage quota cap from SDKWORK_DRIVE_TENANT_QUOTA_MAX_BYTES when set.

storageProviderId.description: Drive storage provider id bound to this upload session.

storageUploadId.description: Provider-side multipart upload id used by the configured object store.

scene.description: Drive uploader usage context identifier. Optional semantic context for idempotency, ownership, and cleanup scoping.

source.description: Drive uploader usage context identifier. Optional semantic context for idempotency, ownership, and cleanup scoping.

shareToken.description: Optional Drive share token authorizing anonymous or external uploads into an explicit target folder. The raw token is accepted only on prepare requests and is never returned.

scene.description: Drive uploader usage context identifier. Optional semantic context for idempotency, ownership, and cleanup scoping.

source.description: Drive uploader usage context identifier. Optional semantic context for idempotency, ownership, and cleanup scoping.

driveNodeId.description: Existing Drive node to expose through /assets.

AppbaseOperationCommand.description: Operation-specific command payload defined by the owning appbase Rust module.

AppbaseSessionCreateCommand.description: Session creation command for credential login and external user-center session exchange.

email.description: Email credential used by standard password login.

username.description: Username credential used by standard password login.

phone.description: Phone credential used by standard password login.

password.description: Write-only password credential used by standard password login.

externalToken.description: Opaque upstream credential used only by an external user-center session exchange.

providerKey.description: External authority provider key used to select the configured bridge.

tenantId.description: Verified tenant id supplied by an external user-center session exchange after upstream identity validation.

organizationId.description: Verified organization id supplied by an external user-center session exchange when the upstream identity resolved an organization scope.

data.description: Operation-specific payload typed per response schema.

item.description: Typed domain resource for the operation.

SdkWorkPlatformErrorCode.description: Platform or domain error code per API_SPEC.md §15.3.

AuthToken.description: SDKWork auth token carried as Authorization: Bearer <auth_token>.
